text.title: White-Label Partnership Design Output Contract
text.summary: Pins the shape of a valid White-Label Partnership Design output. Subagent must satisfy this before returning to the caller.

allowed-transformations.transformation: Trim narrative fields to ≤500 chars preserving named entities + numeric claims.
Promote a 'no decision yet' state to status='pending' rather than fabricating a decision.

list.item: primary_agency populated with a typed value
direct_rate populated with a typed value
white_label_rate populated with a typed value
captivity_pct_cap populated with a typed value
contract_clauses populated with a typed value
review_cadence populated with a typed value
owner populated with a typed value
No forbidden pattern matches the output
